title: Nevada DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — NV class spec + Pay Policy 01 schedule)
description: Narrative research notes for Nevada DDS pay: administering agency (NV DETR Bureau of Disability Adjudication), the verified Disability Adjudicator series (Trainee 12.425 grade 30, I 12.426 grade 31, II 12.428 grade 32, III 12.456 grade 33, Supervisor 12.457 grade 35) with grade assignments from the official NV class spec and annual min/max from the official NV Pay Policy 01 Classified (EE/ER) compensation schedule eff 2025-07-07, a pay-plan caveat (EE/ER vs EPC vs CBU variants), an anti-fabrication methodology note (diagonal-matrix parser mis-assign caught; grade-32 cross-checked to a NEATS announcement), and AFSCME Local 4041 (NSEA) Aug-2024 CBA context. Companion to NV/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Nevada Division of Human Resource Management; NV Dept of Employment, Training and Rehabilitation (DETR) Bureau of Disability Adjudication
source.title: NV DDS salary research notes (NV class spec 12.457 + Pay Policy 01 Classified schedule eff 2025-07-07, retrieved 2026-06-02)

notes: Authoritative: grade assignments from the official NV class spec and annual min/max from the official NV Pay Policy 01 (Classified EE/ER) schedule eff 2025-07-07, read directly from the PDF and cross-checked against an official NEATS grade-32 announcement. Pay-plan caveat: NV also publishes EPC (lower) and CBU-specific variants; Pay Policy 01 EE/ER is the base used. AFSCME Local 4041 Unit C CBA (Aug 2024) exact wage effect not separately verified.
